name: deepseek
role: cheapest model — strongest scaffolding, then cross-verified by Opus
compensates_weakness: hallucination on unknowns; tool-use inefficiency; long-horizon drift

dials.scope: single-concern steps; re-read the requirements before each
dials.abstain: if a fact/number isn't confirmed by the source, output UNKNOWN — never invent it
dials.evidence: cite the source for every figure

verify.why: borrow a low-hallucination model to catch what a cheap one invents
